# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: A template that creates a pair of EC2 instances for our application data

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: Subnet
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc12345
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      NetworkInterfaces:
        -
          DeviceIndex: '0'
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
          PrivateIpAddress: '10.0.1.100'
          SubnetId: !Ref Subnet

  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DependsOn: Instance
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs]
      Size: '20'

  ElasticBlockStoreAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    DependsOn: EBSVolume
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref EBSVolume

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Allow inbound traffic on port 22'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
    Conditions:
      - Condition: "HasEC2"
        PropertyPath: !GetAtt Instance.EC2InstanceId

Outputs:
  InstancePublicIP:
    Description: The public IP of the instance.
    Value: !GetAtt Instance.PublicIp
